source.title: Diabetic eye screening pathway requirements specification
source.population: People eligible for the NHS diabetic eye screening programme, including pathway-specific pregnancy and surveillance groups.
source.setting: End-to-end diabetic eye screening, grading, result communication, surveillance and referral pathways.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected screening-result, visual-acuity, image-grading, result-letter, surveillance and referral-status documentation. It does not independently interpret an individual result or apply directly to UAE screening intervals.

exact_location.heading: End-to-end pathway and information sharing
exact_location.locator: End-to-end pathway; section 1 Before screening test

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording eligibility, attendance, prior pathway status, information sharing and coordination with primary care, diabetology, hospital eye and maternity services.

items.final_wording: Supports recording bilateral visual acuity, image status, grading, screening outcome and result letters sent to the person and relevant clinicians.

source.title: Diabetic eye screening pathway requirements specification

source.setting: End-to-end diabetic eye screening, grading, result communication, surveillance and referral pathways.

exact_location.heading: Screening test, grading and result communication

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording bilateral visual acuity, image status, grading, screening outcome and result letters sent to the person and relevant clinicians.

items.rationale: The exact screening-test and result section supports associated symptoms, relevant negatives, focused examination if actually assessed and clinician-reviewed result documentation without assigning a retinal grade.

items.final_wording: Supports recording clinician-confirmed surveillance, ungradable-image, digital-surveillance or hospital-eye-service referral status without autonomously assigning a grade or destination.

exact_location.heading: Surveillance and hospital-eye-service pathway
exact_location.locator: section 2 Screening test; surveillance and referral requirements

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording clinician-confirmed surveillance, ungradable-image, digital-surveillance or hospital-eye-service referral status without autonomously assigning a grade or destination.

items.rationale: The exact surveillance and referral pathway supports recording a clinician-entered plan, safety discussion and arranged follow-up only when already determined; it does not generate referral or surveillance timing.
